439 TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_ADMSN_CD TRNSPRTN_NO_RSPNS_ADMSN_CD Transportation: Patient unable to respond (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents that at the time of admission the patient was unable to respond to the question regarding lack of transportation. 0 = No
1 = Yes
